understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem (+) tile by navigating the grid to win the level.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Horizontal MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT shifts x then auto-falls fully in current gravity (DOWN toward lower y or UP toward higher y) until landing on safe tile (o/m/w), hazard (u/v spikes = instant loss), or goal. CLICK removes breakable x blocks at target to open paths (clicks don't consume steps or advance timers). UNDO reverts last action; limited attempts/turns require planning fall paths via corridor_scan/landings and avoiding dead-ends.
